description_long: This playground installation features a collection of interconnected climbing frames, monkey bars, and parallel bars, arranged in a linear and modular fashion. The structures are primarily composed of metal poles painted in bright colors such as yellow, blue, and red, with some sections featuring horizontal rungs for climbing and swinging. The design includes multiple play zones: a large monkey bar section, a set of parallel bars, and smaller climbing frames, each offering different physical challenges. The equipment is open and accessible from all sides, with no visible safety barriers or enclosures. The overall layout encourages active play, climbing, swinging, and balancing, suitable for children and possibly adults. The surfaces appear hard and durable, designed for outdoor urban parks or recreational areas.
description: A modular playground set with interconnected monkey bars, climbing frames, and parallel bars in bright colors, designed for climbing and swinging. The open structure encourages active play and physical challenges.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the playground from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the linear arrangement of the monkey bars, parallel bars, and smaller climbing frames.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a frontal perspective, emphasizing the length of the monkey bars and the parallel alignment of the play structures.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the playground from the opposite side, revealing the open spaces between the structures and the symmetry of the layout.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear angle, showcasing the interconnectedness of the climbing frames and the variety of play elements.
attribute_playground_equipment_type: climbing frame and monkey bars set
